text: Stronger Than Ever Get to the Point. PEEK Zip Anchor PEEK Zip Anchor Stronger Than Ever. 5.5mm PEEK Zip Anchor 3910-200-035 5.5mm PEEK Zip Anchor with Needles 3910-200-030 PEEK Zip Anchor The PEEK Zip Anchor is fully cannulated and features a trocar-tip inserter to distribute insertion torque along the length of the implant. No tap is needed. The cannulation of the anchor provides a direct channel from the bone marrow to the rotator cuff. The PEEK Zip Anchor is designed with independent suture eyelets, which are designed to separate each strand of the Force Fiber working suture for easier suture management. Available in 5.5mm and 6.5mm sizes, with and without half-circle taper needles, the PEEK Zip Anchor is a chosen anchor for rotator cuff and other soft-tissue repairs. 6.5mm PEEK Zip Anchor 3910-200-075 6.5mm PEEK Zip Anchor with Needles 3910-200-070 Features: Trocar-tip inserter to withstand greater torque and for repositioning if necessary. Double-helix thread design for excellent purchase. Separate suture eyelets for better suture management. Available in 5.5mm and 6.5mm sizes. With and without needles.
